entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched around June 2018. BKEX suspended withdrawals on May 29, 2023 while cooperating with a police money-laundering investigation; its original domain and normal markets have not returned to verifiable operation, but no formal liquidation or permanent closure notice establishes a terminal date.
entity.notes: HEI retains limited rather than dead because the strongest preserved first-party announcement described a temporary withdrawal suspension for police cooperation, not a formal permanent shutdown. Current unrelated BKEX-branded domains are not treated as continuity of the original bkex.com platform.

expected.summary: British Virgin Islands-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched around June 2018. BKEX suspended withdrawals on 2023-05-29, citing cooperation with a police investigation after some platform user funds were allegedly involved in money laundering. Public market trackers now list BKEX as untracked, and normal exchange operations have not been treated as restored.
expected.notes: HEI uses limited rather than dead because the available sources show withdrawal suspension and apparent non-restoration of normal service, but do not provide a primary liquidation, bankruptcy, or formal permanent-closure notice. death_reason remains null until a terminal closure classification is better supported.

changes.summary: British Virgin Islands-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched around June 2018. BKEX suspended withdrawals on May 29, 2023 while cooperating with a police money-laundering investigation; its original domain and normal markets have not returned to verifiable operation, but no formal liquidation or permanent closure notice establishes a terminal date.
changes.notes: HEI retains limited rather than dead because the strongest preserved first-party announcement described a temporary withdrawal suspension for police cooperation, not a formal permanent shutdown. Current unrelated BKEX-branded domains are not treated as continuity of the original bkex.com platform.

evidence.title: BKEX announcement on suspension of withdrawals
evidence.notes: Preserved exchange announcement states that withdrawals were suspended while BKEX cooperated with police evidence collection related to alleged money laundering.

evidence.title: BKEX exchange statistics
evidence.notes: Current tracker shows zero reported volume and zero currencies, supporting non-restoration of normal exchange markets.
